title: GestureEvent
description: Single gesture event emitted by the Signal pipeline (Team 1) and consumed by the Driver runtime (Team 2). Sent over the local WebSocket and also replayable from fixtures/mock_gestures.jsonl.

gesture_id.description: Stable identifier. Must match an id listed in profile.json. Examples: head_tilt_left, head_tilt_right, head_pitch_up, head_pitch_down, smile, brow_raise, jaw_open, blink_left, blink_right.

type.description: analog: continuous signal in value, emitted every frame while active. discrete: one-shot edge event (gesture fired). dwell: cursor held still for value milliseconds.

value.description: analog: signed magnitude in [-1.0, 1.0]. discrete: 0 (off) or 1 (on). dwell: milliseconds held.

confidence.description: Classifier confidence. Runtime may drop events below a threshold.

timestamp.description: Monotonic seconds since pipeline start. Use time.monotonic() on the Python side.
